message:
fix(watch): use checked_sub to prevent panic on short system uptime

Instant::now() - Duration panics if the resulting time predates the
monotonic clock epoch. With very large --watch-interval values on a
freshly booted system, this could crash. Use checked_sub with fallback
to Instant::now() instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
